title: AMENDMENT NO. 14 TO CREDIT AGREEMENT
text_head: AMENDMENT NO. 14 TO CREDIT AGREEMENT dated as of March 31, 2025, by and among ENVIRI Corporation, as Borrower, the Lenders party hereto, and JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., as Administrative Agent. WHEREAS, the Borrower, the Lenders and the Administrative Agent are party to that certain Credit Agreement dated as of June 30, 2020 (as amended, the 'Existing Credit Agreement'). The parties agree to amend the Revolving Credit Commitments and extend the Maturity Date.
